question: What is the 'home section' referring to?
options: The root landing page (/) that users see when they first visit the site
A new section to add alongside Agent/Forest/Study/Crawl

question: What content should be displayed in the masonry grid?
options: Links/cards to the four main sections (Agent, Forest, Study, Crawl)
User-created notes or posts with optional images
Recent activity from all sections (recent cards studied, agent tasks, etc.)
Static content defined in code or config

question: Should users be able to add, edit, or delete grid items?
options: Yes, full CRUD operations with a form/modal
No, items are static or automatically generated
Only add new items, no editing or deleting

question: What determines whether a grid item has an image or is text-only?
options: User chooses when creating/editing the item
Automatically determined based on content type or source
All items should support optional images
